mapper.select: SELECT sys04_role.*, f_get_company_nm(sys04_company_id) AS sys04_company_nm FROM sys04_role WHERE sys04_company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY sys04_seq

SELECT sys04_role.*, sys05_user_role.*, CASE WHEN sys05_user_role_id IS NULL THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS sys04_user_role_yn, f_get_company_nm(sys04_company_id) AS sys04_company_nm FROM sys04_role LEFT OUTER JOIN sys05_user_role ON sys04_role_id = sys05_role_id AND sys05_user_id = #{userId} WHERE sys04_company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY sys04_seq, sys05_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys04_role (sys04_company_id, sys04_role_nm, sys04_note, sys04_seq, sys04_default_role, sys04_admin_yn) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{roleName}, #{note}, #{seq}, #{defaultRole}, #{adminYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys04_role SET sys04_role_nm = #{roleName}, sys04_note = #{note}, sys04_seq = #{seq}, sys04_default_role = #{defaultRole}, sys04_admin_yn = #{adminYn} WHERE sys04_role_id = #{roleId}
